headline: Dow Jones Futures Due As Iran Attacks Israel; Market Rally Faces First Real Test
summary: Futures loom after the stock market rally broke key support. Iran fired missiles at Israel. The SpaceX IPO, Apple's AI push and Oracle earnings are ahead.

headline: Lilly's Foundayo (orforglipron), the only oral GLP-1 taken without food or water restrictions, was associated with significant weight loss in women at every stage of menopause
summary: Eli Lilly and Company (NYSE: LLY), the maker of Zepbound (tirzepatide), today announced results demonstrating that women with obesity or overweight who took the highest dose of Foundayo experienced significant weight loss at every stage of menopause. These findings, based on post-hoc analyses of more than 1,500 female participants in the ATTAIN-1 and ATTAIN-2 clinical trials, were presented at the American Diabetes Association (ADA) 86th Scientific Sessions.

headline: Eli Lilly Expands Beyond Obesity With US$4b Vaccine And Genetic Bets
summary: Eli Lilly (NYSE:LLY) has agreed to acquire three vaccine and infectious disease companies, Curevo, LimmaTech Biologics, and Vaccine Company, in deals totaling nearly US$4b. The acquisitions expand Eli Lilly's reach beyond its core obesity and diabetes franchises into vaccines and infectious diseases. Alongside these acquisitions, Eli Lilly has recently entered partnerships in genetic and RNA based therapies with groups including Ascidian Therapeutics, Hanmi Pharm, and Haisco Pharmaceutical...
